results.check_summary: Odd and even position streams are arithmetic and replay the full prefix.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE: odd terms increase by 4; even terms decrease by 2.

results.check_summary: Negative-three steps occur between triangularly spaced positive corrections of 5, 8, 11, 14, then 17.
results.rule_summary: PDELTA with triangular correction positions and corrections increasing by 3.

results.check_summary: Growing blocks start at positions 1, 3, 6, 10, 15; starts have successive increments -3, 2, 8, 15, and block steps decrease by 4.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK with triangular block boundaries, polynomial starts, and repeated block steps.

results.check_summary: Three phase-specific affine maps replay every prefix transition.
results.rule_summary: AFFINE cycle: x→-2x-2, then x→3x-7, then x→-2x-6.

results.check_summary: Finite differences have constant fifth difference -8, determining the continuation.
results.rule_summary: POLY with constant fifth finite difference -8.

results.check_summary: Four residue-class streams have increments increasing arithmetically by phase.
Finite differences fit exactly: second differences decrease by 5 at every step.
results.rule_summary: Cubic POLY with constant third difference -5.

results.check_summary: Best-supported continuation among the anonymous modular-affine candidates.
results.rule_summary: MODAFFINE continuation inferred from the full bounded prefix.

results.check_summary: Odd and even subsequences each have constant second difference -11.
Four interleaved phase streams fit independent quadratic continuations.
Phase-periodic multiplier-2 affine updates replay the full prefix.
results.rule_summary: Periodic AFFINE with multiplier 2 and alternating phase biases.
